measurements.description: Select the measurements for the previously selected stations. Labels like (9/15) show how many selected stations currently provide that measurement.

user.description: Select the monitoring stations to include in Home Assistant. If a Home Assistant location is available, they are ordered by distance. The five nearest stations are preselected. A total of {station_count} stations are available.
user.title: Select monitoring stations
